_note: Schema reference for the optional bot+member registry consulted by the feishu-social extension. The real file lives at ~/.openclaw/feishu-social/wiki-bots.json (path overridable via social.wikiBotsPath). Gitignore it where you keep it — it typically contains real Feishu identifiers. The extension only reads this file when social.enabled is true and social.contextGroups names at least one chat.
